text.value: An HTML fragment from the set [cross-version-analysis.xhtml, cross-version-analysis-inline.xhtml, cross-version-analysis.xhtml, cross-version-analysis-inline.xhtml] is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide
An HTML fragment from the set [globals-table.xhtml, globals-table.xhtml] is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide
An HTML fragment from the set [expansion-params.xhtml, expansion-params.xhtml] is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide
Pinned the version of http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Base to 4.0.1

Constraint failed: eld-20: 'Element names should be simple alphanumerics with a max of 64 characters, or code generation tools may be broken (path.matches('[A-Za-z][A-Za-z0-9]*(\\.[a-z][A-Za-z0-9]*(\\[x])?)*'))'
